name: Before the City of Cloudy Mountain
description:
In this are many dragons and half-dragons.  Under normal circumstances,
dragons tend to live in solitary environments, but due to disappearing 
territories, many have gathered in this city.  Some have also have taken 
spouses from other races, creating new half-races.  Although legally these
half-dragons are to be treated equal, most of the high ranking officials and
officers are pure dragon.
